---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a Relayna Gateway capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Please read this first

- Have you searched existing issues for similar requests?
- Have you checked whether the README, docs, or design manifesto already cover
  this?

### Affected area

Mark all that apply:

- [ ] Gateway startup / config
- [ ] Authentication / virtual keys
- [ ] Policy / route or model access
- [ ] OpenAI-compatible route
- [ ] LiteLLM proxying
- [ ] Direct provider passthrough
- [ ] Streaming
- [ ] Usage tracking / pricing
- [ ] Rate limits / budgets
- [ ] Admin APIs
- [ ] PostgreSQL schema / migrations
- [ ] Redis counters / state
- [ ] Telemetry / logs / metrics / traces
- [ ] Relayna runtime integration
- [ ] Packaging / deployment
- [ ] Documentation

### Describe the feature

What should Relayna Gateway support?

### Use case

What problem does this solve? Include a realistic client, operator, or Relayna
workflow.

### Proposed behavior

Describe the desired route, policy, configuration, storage behavior, telemetry,
or operational flow if you have one in mind.

### Compatibility considerations

Would this change public routes, response shapes, virtual key behavior,
environment variables, usage event fields, PostgreSQL schemas, Redis key
patterns, provider routing, streaming behavior, or Relayna runtime integration?

### Alternatives considered

What workarounds or other designs have you considered?
